main.description: An agent's CURRENT self-reported status (TASK-84). Published as the per-agent artifact status.<agent-id> — a latest-value record, not a stream — so the dash and crew can see what each agent is doing at a glance, instead of agents acking in chat. Single writer per record: the agent itself (its status hook, TASK-87, or an explicit self-report). Content is opaque to the bus; this is a convention.

state.description: Coarse state, one of: idle (nothing in flight) | working (actively progressing) | waiting-for-human (soft wait on a person) | waiting-for-agent (soft wait on another agent, e.g. a gate or dependency) | blocked (HARD blocked, needs help) | done (finished). Drives the dash status pill.

headline.description: A short present-tense line of what the agent is doing right now, e.g. 'implementing the dash history fix' or 'awaiting lena's review'.

by.description: Who set it (convenience label; the bus-stamped author of the artifact write is authoritative).
